name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Baltimore, MD's US Cash Advance at Washington Blvd offers fast payday and title loans in a standalone storefront open Mon–Fri 8AM–9PM.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a standalone storefront at 3227 Washington Blvd #11 in Baltimore, MD. This neighborhood location is open Mon–Fri 8AM–9PM and Sat–Sun 10AM–7PM, making it accessible during and after work hours.

At this Baltimore location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and cash advances. Call +1 410-701-2322 to discuss your needs, ask about required documentation, or get fast approval estimates during operating hours.

For Baltimore residents facing unexpected expenses or short-term cash needs, this US Cash Advance location provides same-day funding options. Bring your ID, recent pay stubs, and proof of income—processing in Maryland is often completed the same day you apply.
pros: Extended hours (Mon–Fri 8am–9pm, weekends 10am–7pm) accommodate working adults
In-store process reportedly completed in under 45 minutes per customer review
Accepts all credit types including bad credit and no credit history
No collateral required on any listed loan product
Physical Detroit storefront available for in-person assistance
Loan range spans $100 to $50,000 across product types
4.4 customer rating with specific staff (Doris) praised for transparent explanations
cons: Referral model: loans are funded by unnamed third-party lenders, not US Cash Advance directly — terms vary and are not disclosed upfront
APR information is absent from the location page; disclosure text is truncated before revealing rate ranges
At least one review names 'Express Payday Loans' instead of US Cash Advance, suggesting templated or shared review content
Contact email uses a staging/development domain (kinsta.cloud) rather than a professional business address
No online pre-approval option noted by a customer reviewer; in-person visit currently required to complete the process
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers needing small emergency loans ($100–$1,000) same day
Consumers with bad or no credit who have been declined by traditional lenders
People who prefer in-person guidance through the loan process
Borrowers with evening or weekend availability who cannot visit standard business-hours lenders
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area borrowers who need small emergency cash ($100–$1,000) quickly and have poor or no credit. Because it operates as a third-party lender referral service with no APR ranges disclosed on the site, borrowers must carefully review the specific lender's offer — including full rate and fee disclosures — before signing any agreement.
services: In-store loan processing at Detroit branch
meta_description: Baltimore, MD payday loans at US Cash Advance, 3227 Washington Blvd. Fast approval and same-day funding available.
seo_title: US Cash Advance in Baltimore, MD | CreditDoc
